positive: A minimalist, highly stylized silhouette illustration of a cosmic celestial journey. The main subject is a majestic, stylized crescent moon and a cluster of geometric constellations formed by nebulae and deep space dust. The overall composition should be centered, clean, and suitable for repeating apparel patterns. Use a limited, vibrant color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, glowing gold, and matte black. The style should be a blend of Art Deco elegance and modern celestial graphic design, featuring crisp lines, geometric shapes, and negative space for strong contrast. High contrast, vector art quality, print-ready, perfect for t-shirts, centered composition, flat graphic design, isolated on white background.
